root_text.an4.205:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco micchādiṭṭhiko hoti, micchāsaṅkappo hoti, micchāvāco hoti, micchākammanto hoti, micchāājīvo hoti, micchāvāyāmo hoti, micchāsati hoti, micchāsamādhi hoti.
root_text.an4.205:3.2: Idha bhikkhave, ekacco attanā ca micchādiṭṭhiko hoti, parañca micchādiṭṭhiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:3.3: attanā ca micchāsaṅkappo hoti, parañca micchāsaṅkappe samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:3.4: attanā ca micchāvāco hoti, parañca micchāvācāya samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:3.5: attanā ca micchākammanto hoti, parañca micchākammante samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:3.6: attanā ca micchāājīvo hoti, parañca micchāājīve samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:3.7: attanā ca micchāvāyāmo hoti, parañca micchāvāyāme samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:3.8: attanā ca micchāsati hoti, parañca micchāsatiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:3.9: attanā ca micchāsamādhi hoti, parañca micchāsamādhimhi samādapeti.
root_text.an4.205:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco sammādiṭṭhiko hoti, sammāsaṅkappo hoti, sammāvāco hoti, sammākammanto hoti, sammāājīvo hoti, sammāvāyāmo hoti, sammāsati hoti, sammāsamādhi hoti.
root_text.an4.205:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco attanā ca sammādiṭṭhiko hoti, parañca sammādiṭṭhiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:5.3: attanā ca sammāsaṅkappo hoti, parañca sammāsaṅkappe samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:5.4: attanā ca sammāvāco hoti, parañca sammāvācāya samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:5.5: attanā ca sammākammanto hoti, parañca sammākammante samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:5.6: attanā ca sammāājīvo hoti, parañca sammāājīve samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:5.7: attanā ca sammāvāyāmo hoti, parañca sammāvāyāme samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:5.8: attanā ca sammāsati hoti, parañca sammāsatiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.205:5.9: attanā ca sammāsamādhi hoti, parañca sammāsamādhimhi samādapeti.

translation_text.an4.205:1.1: “Mendicants, I will teach you an untrue person and an even more untrue person,
translation_text.an4.205:1.2: a true person and an even truer person.
translation_text.an4.205:2.1: And what is an untrue person?
translation_text.an4.205:2.2: It’s someone who has wrong view, wrong thought, wrong speech, wrong action, wrong livelihood, wrong effort, wrong mindfulness, and wrong immersion.
translation_text.an4.205:2.3: This is called an untrue person.
translation_text.an4.205:3.1: And what is an even more untrue person?
translation_text.an4.205:3.2: It’s someone who has wrong view, wrong thought, wrong speech, wrong action, wrong livelihood, wrong effort, wrong mindfulness, and wrong immersion. And they encourage others in these same qualities.
translation_text.an4.205:3.10: This is called an even more untrue person.
translation_text.an4.205:4.1: And what is a true person?
translation_text.an4.205:4.2: It’s someone who has right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, and right immersion.
translation_text.an4.205:4.3: This is called a true person.
translation_text.an4.205:5.1: And what is an even truer person?
translation_text.an4.205:5.2: It’s someone who has right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, and right immersion. And they encourage others in these same qualities.
translation_text.an4.205:5.10: This is called an even truer person.”
